sentences.target: Tu saignes de la narine gauche.

translations.fr: Tu saignes de la narine gauche.
translations.en: You're bleeding from the left nostril.
translations.es: Estás sangrando de la narina izquierda.
translations.de: Du blutest aus dem linken Nasenloch.
translations.ru: У тебя идет кровь из левой ноздри.
translations.pt: Você está sangrando pela narina esquerda.
translations.vi: Bạn đang chảy máu từ lỗ mũi bên trái.
translations.ar: أنت تنزف من فتحة الأنف اليسرى.
translations.nl: Je bloedt uit je linker neusgat.
translations.uk: У тебе йде кров з лівої ніздрі.
translations.hi: तुम्हारे बाएँ नथुने से खून निकल रहा है।
translations.id: Kamu berdarah dari lubang hidung kiri.
translations.ja: 左の鼻の穴から血が出ている。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; marks the subject of the clause.
Lexical verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; agrees with 'Tu'.
Preposition introducing a source/point of origin (‘de la narine’).
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner for 'narine'.
Common noun, feminine; head of the NP 'la narine gauche'.
Adjective meaning 'left'; agrees in gender/number with 'narine' (feminine singular).

sentences.target: J'ai un piercing à la narine.

translations.fr: J'ai un piercing à la narine.
translations.en: I have a piercing on my nostril.
translations.es: Tengo un piercing en la narina.
translations.de: Ich habe ein Piercing am Nasenloch.
translations.vi: Tôi có một cái khuyên ở lỗ mũi.
translations.nl: Ik heb een piercing in mijn neusgat.
translations.nb: Jeg har en piercing i neseboret.
translations.id: Aku punya tindik di lubang hidung.
translations.sv: Jag har en piercing i näsborren.
translations.da: Jeg har en piercing i næseboret.
translations.ja: 鼻の穴にピアスをしている。

tokens.explanation: Fused clitic subject pronoun 'je' with the lexical verb 'avoir' (present, 1st person singular); functions as main verb 'to have'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'piercing'.
Borrowed common noun (masculine); direct object of 'avoir'.
Preposition introducing a locative complement ('à la narine').
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner for 'narine'.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'à'.

sentences.target: Il a un poil dans la narine.
sentences.reading: /il a œ̃ pwal dɑ̃ la naʁin/

translations.fr: Il a un poil dans la narine.
translations.ipa: /il a œ̃ pwal dɑ̃ la naʁin/
translations.en: He has a hair in his nostril.
translations.es: Él tiene un pelo en la narina.
translations.de: Er hat ein Haar im Nasenloch.
translations.it: Lui ha un pelo nella narice.
translations.pt: Ele tem um pelo na narina.
translations.tr: Onun burun deliğinde bir kıl var.
translations.vi: Anh ấy có một sợi lông trong lỗ mũi.
translations.nl: Hij heeft een haar in zijn neusgat.
translations.hu: Neki az orrlyukában van egy szál szőr.
translations.hi: उसके नथुने में एक बाल है।
translations.nb: Han har et hår i neseboret.
translations.id: Dia punya rambut di lubang hidung.
translations.sv: Han har ett hårstrå i näsborren.
translations.ro: El are un fir de păr în nară.
translations.da: Han har et hår i næseboret.
translations.ja: 彼は鼻の穴に毛が一本ある。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person singular masculine.
Lexical verb 'avoir', present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner for 'poil'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'a'.
Preposition introducing a locative complement ('dans la narine').
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner for 'narine'.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: Elle a un bouton près de la narine.
sentences.reading: /ɛl a œ̃ butɔ̃ pʁɛ də la naʁin/

translations.fr: Elle a un bouton près de la narine.
translations.ipa: /ɛl a œ̃ butɔ̃ pʁɛ də la naʁin/
translations.en: She has a pimple near her nostril.
translations.es: Ella tiene un granito cerca de la narina.
translations.de: Sie hat einen Pickel in der Nähe des Nasenlochs.
translations.it: Lei ha un brufolo vicino alla narice.
translations.zh-Hans: 她鼻孔附近有一颗痘痘。
translations.yue: 佢個鼻孔附近有粒暗瘡。
translations.pt: Ela tem uma espinha perto da narina.
translations.tr: Onun burun deliği yakınında bir sivilce var.
translations.vi: Cô ấy có một nốt mụn gần lỗ mũi.
translations.ar: لديها بثرة بالقرب من فتحة الأنف.
translations.nl: Zij heeft een puistje bij haar neusgat.
translations.hu: Az orrlyuka mellett van egy pattanás.
translations.hi: उसके नथुने के पास एक मुंहासा है।
translations.nb: Hun har en kvise nær neseboret.
translations.id: Dia punya jerawat dekat lubang hidung.
translations.sv: Hon har en finne nära näsborren.
translations.ro: Ea are un coș lângă nară.
translations.da: Hun har en bums tæt på næseboret.
translations.ja: 彼女は鼻の穴の近くにニキビがある。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine.
Lexical verb 'avoir', present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner for 'bouton'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'a'.
Adverb forming a complex prepositional phrase with 'de' ('près de' = 'near').
Preposition completing the locution 'près de' to introduce the complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner for 'narine'.
Common noun, feminine; object/complement of the prepositional phrase 'près de'.
